G

getChangelogValue(CustomField, Object) - Method in class com.burningcode.jira.issue.customfields.impl.WatcherFieldType
Overridden, returns the value reported in the changelog

getIssueId() - Method in class com.burningcode.jira.rest.Watchers
 
getUsername() - Method in class com.burningcode.jira.rest.Watcher
 
getValueFromIssue(CustomField, Issue) - Method in class com.burningcode.jira.issue.customfields.impl.WatcherFieldType
Overridden, returns the a list of watchers on the passed issue
getVelocityParameters(Issue, CustomField, FieldLayoutItem) - Method in class com.burningcode.jira.issue.customfields.impl.WatcherFieldType
Overridden, adds the "hasPermissions" parameter to velocity with true if the authenticated user has "Manage Watcher List" permissions, false otherwise.
getWatcherfieldIds() - Method in class com.burningcode.jira.rest.Watchers
